mapper.insert: insert into integration_event_outbox() values(#{event.integrationEventId},#{event.eventId},#{event.eventType},#{event.aggregateType},#{event.aggregateId},coalesce(cast(#{event.envelopeJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb),#{event.status},#{event.attemptCount},#{event.nextAttemptAt},#{event.lastError},#{event.claimedBy},#{event.claimUntil},#{event.createdAt},#{event.deliveredAt},#{event.updatedAt}) on conflict(event_id) do nothing
mapper.update: update integration_event_outbox set status='DELIVERED',delivered_at=#{deliveredAt},updated_at=#{deliveredAt},last_error=null,next_attempt_at=null,claimed_by=null,claim_until=null where integration_event_id=#{integrationEventId} and status='DELIVERING' and claimed_by=#{workerId} and claim_until=#{claimUntil}

update integration_event_outbox set status='RETRY_WAITING',attempt_count=#{attemptCount},next_attempt_at=#{nextAttemptAt},last_error=#{error},claimed_by=null,claim_until=null,updated_at=#{updatedAt} where integration_event_id=#{integrationEventId} and status='DELIVERING' and claimed_by=#{workerId} and claim_until=#{claimUntil}

update integration_event_outbox set status='DEAD_LETTER',attempt_count=#{attemptCount},last_error=#{error},next_attempt_at=null,claimed_by=null,claim_until=null,updated_at=#{updatedAt} where integration_event_id=#{integrationEventId} and status='DELIVERING' and claimed_by=#{workerId} and claim_until=#{claimUntil}
mapper.select: select status,count(*)::integer as total from integration_event_outbox group by status order by status
